title: pyrus mongolica
intro: Pyrus mongolica, also known as the Mongolian pear or Chinese mountain pear, is a species of pear tree native to China and parts of Mongolia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The bark, leaves, and fruit of the Pyrus mongolica plant are used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory properties and ability to promote sweating. Herbal preparations of Pyrus mongolica, such as infusions and decoctions, are typically consumed to take advantage of its health benefits, including its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory symptoms.
